Liposomal formulation (Caelyx brand). First infusion at maximum rate of 1mg/minute; if well tolerated subsequent infusions over 60 minutes. Doses <90mg diluted in 250ml glucose 5%; doses >=90mg in 500ml glucose 5%. Incompatible with sodium chloride 0.9% - always use glucose 5% flush. Do NOT use in-line filters. Lifetime maximum cumulative doxorubicin dose 450mg/m2 (400mg/m2 if prior mediastinal/pericardial radiotherapy). Dose banded per national dose bands (2mg/ml).

drugs.notes: days 1 and 8 every 21 days | For elderly/frail patients consider gemcitabine 750mg/m2. Dose banded per national dose bands. If dose modifications required on day 1, continue with reduced dose on day 8.

indication: Recurrent platinum sensitive ovarian cancer where re-treatment with paclitaxel is inappropriate. WHO performance status 0, 1, 2

chemotherapy_drugs.special_instructions: Maximum dose 600mg (creatinine clearance 125ml/min); set at 630mg in ARIA. For elderly/frail patients consider AUC 3. Dose banded per national dose bands (10mg/ml). Carboplatin dose may need alteration if renal function changes by >10% from previous cycle.
For elderly/frail patients consider gemcitabine 750mg/m2. Dose banded per national dose bands (100mg/ml).

take_home_medicines.frequency: three times a day for 3 days then as required
take_home_medicines.instructions: For nausea; supply 28x10mg tablets or original pack as appropriate

dose_modifications.notes: Delay one week. If counts >=1x10^9/L continue full dose. If still <1x10^9/L delay further week; if recovered continue with 80% dose of both agents. Otherwise consider stopping.
Delay one week. If platelets >=100x10^9/L continue full dose. If still <100x10^9/L delay further week; if recovered continue with 80% dose of both agents. Otherwise consider stopping.
Delay until recovery to >=100x10^9/L then continue with 50% doses.
Initiate treatment at 800mg/m2
Omit carboplatin. Significant GFR changes >10% may require dose adjustment.
Consider dose reduction
Delay until resolved to grade 1 or below. Reduce dose of causative agent to 80% or discontinue.

monitoring_requirements: FBC, LFTs and U&Es prior to each cycle
EDTA or calculated creatinine clearance prior to each cycle
CA125 prior to each cycle
special_warnings: Carboplatin maximum dose 600mg (creatinine clearance 125ml/min); set at 630mg in ARIA.
Carboplatin dose may need to be altered if renal function changes by >10% from previous cycle.
Day 1 only gemcitabine schedule (no day 8 dose in this protocol variant).
